residence.place: District 4, Upper Falls, Harford County, MD

residence.census_notes: Marital Status: Married; Relation to Head of House: Wife

sources.note: Baptized Oct 22, 1837, Saint Johns Parish, Prince George's MD
Marriage to James H. Gordon, Mar 15, 1859, Washington DC
Marriage to George Washington Nokes, Feb 4, 1878, DC

notes: 2nd great-grandmother. Born in Prince George's County, MD. Baptized Oct 22, 1837 at Saint Johns Parish. Father Samuel Arnold (1795-1855) died in Washington DC. Mother Mary Ann Sheriff (1805-1863) died August 1, 1863 in Washington DC. First marriage: James H. Gordon on March 15, 1859 in DC. Children with Gordon: Katie E. (1859-1863), Willie Arnold (1861-1862), William Wallace (1866-1926), Nettie (d. 1870), Mary M. (1868-). Lost two children young. James died July 13, 1869 at 31, leaving Mary Jane a widow at 33. Second marriage: George Washington Nokes (1836-1891) on February 4, 1878 in DC. Children with Nokes: Mary H. Nokes (1863-), William U. Nokes (1865-1923), Matilda C. Nokes (1867-), George W. Nokes (1869-1894), Ethel Adelaide Nokes (1878-1915), Royce Arnold Nokes (1880-). Third marriage: 1885 (details unknown). George Nokes died June 20, 1891 in Centerville, Prince George's MD. Son George W. Nokes died 1894. Died December 31, 1909 at age 73 in Washington DC.
